description_long: This is a bright red baseball cap with a classic six-panel construction and a slightly curved brim. The crown is rounded and features visible stitching lines radiating from the top button, giving it a structured yet soft appearance. The brim is moderately wide and curves downward at the front, providing shade for the face. At the back, there is an adjustable strap, likely made of fabric or plastic, allowing for a customizable fit. The surface of the cap appears to be made of a soft, matte fabric, possibly cotton or a cotton blend, with no visible logos or decorative elements. The underside of the brim and the interior are not fully visible, but the cap is likely lined with a thin layer of fabric for comfort.
description: A bright red, soft-fabric baseball cap with a curved brim and adjustable strap at the back, featuring a classic six-panel design and no visible logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved brim and rounded crown with visible stitching.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the curved brim and the structured six-panel crown.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the adjustable strap and the back panels of the cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile and the attachment of the adjustable strap.
